entry.title: Java 常见的概念及原理
entry.content: Java 常见的概念及原理，如动态代理，反射机制，注解，多线程等等 1.动态代理2.反射机制3.注解4.多线程5.ng

entry.title: Java 引用
entry.content: 在使用 JAVA 时候，强、软、弱、虚引用是我们在提高软件运行效率和内存优化时，经常用到的。在此总结下其特点。 总结 强引用 软引用 弱引用 虚引用 被垃圾回收时间 从来不会 内存不足 gc回收时 unkown 用途 对象的一般状态 对象缓存 对象缓存 unkown 生存时间 JVM 停止运行时终止 内存不足终止 gc运行后终止 unkown

entry.title: Android 权限大全
entry.content: 总结下 Android 中使用的权限，便于快速查找和使用。 permissiongroup只是一个逻辑分组，作用也只有显示应用程序权限给用户看的。实际在权限的使用中用 permission 。 permission_group type group_name note String CALENDAR Used for runtime permissions related to user’s calendar. 用户日历相关的运行时权限。 String CAMERA Used for permissions that are associated with accessing camera or capturing images/video from the device. 访问照相机或从设备捕获图像/视频相关的权限。 String CONTACTS Used for runtime permissions related to contacts and profiles on this device. 设备上的联系人和个人资料相关的运行时权限。 String LOCATION Used for permissions that allow accessing the device location. 允许访问设备位置定位信息的权限。 String MICROPHONE Used for permissions that are associated with accessing microphone audio from the device. 从设备的麦克风访问音频数据的相关权限。 String PHONE Used for permissions that are associated telephony features. 与电话功能相关的权限。 String SENSORS Used for permissions that are associated with accessing camera or capturing images/video from the device. 访问照相机或从设备捕获图像/视频相关的权限。 String SMS Used for runtime permissions related to user’s SMS messages. 用户SMS短消息相关的运行时权限。 String STORAGE Used for runtime permissions related to the shared external storage. 共享外部存储相关的运行时权限。 permissionps: 使用：”android.permission.name” type name note String ACCESS_CHECKIN_PROPERTIES Allows read/write access to the “properties” table in the checkin database, to change values that get uploaded. 允许读写访问在checkin数据库中的“properties”表，修改值并上传。 String ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION Allows an app to access approximate location. 允许应用程序获取粗略的位置定位。 String ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION Allows an app to access precise location. 允许应用程序获取精确的位置定位。 String ACCESS_LOCATION_EXTRA_COMMANDS Allows an application to access extra location provider commands. 允许应用程序访问额外的位置定位提供者命令。 String ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE Allows applications to access information about networks. 允许应用程序访问有关网络的信息 String ACCESS_NOTIFICATION_POLICY Marker permission for applications that wish to access notification policy. 对希望访问通知策略的应用程序的标记权限。 String ACCESS_WIFI_STATE Allows applications to access information about Wi-Fi networks. 允许应用程序访问有关Wi-Fi网络的信息。 String ACCOUNT_MANAGER allows applications to call into AccountAuthenticators. 允许应用程序调用AccountAuthenticators。 String ADD_VOICEMAIL Allows an application to add voicemails into the system. 允许应用程序添加语音信箱到系统中。 String ALLOCATE_AGGRESSIVE Allows an application to aggressively allocate disk space. 允许应用程序积极地分配磁盘空间。 String BATTERY_STATS Allows an application to collect battery statistics 允许应用程序收集电池状态。 String BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE Must be required by an AccessibilityService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it. 必须由AccessibilityService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_APPWIDGET Allows an application to tell the AppWidget service which application can access AppWidget’s data. 允许应用程序告诉Appwidget service，其可以访问Appwidget数据。 String BIND_AUTO_FILL Must be required by a AutoFillService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it. 必须由AutoFillService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_CARRIER_MESSAGING_SERVICE This constant was deprecated in API level 23. Use BIND_CARRIER_SERVICES instead.此常量在API level 23版本中被取消。用 BIND_CARRIER_SERVICES来代替 String BIND_CARRIER_SERVICESThe system process that is allowed to bind to services in carrier apps will have this permission.拥有此权限，则系统进程被允许绑定到载体应用程序中的service。 String BIND_CHOOSER_TARGET_SERVICEMust be required by a ChooserTargetService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由ChooserTargetService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_CONDITION_PROVIDER_SERVICEMust be required by a ConditionProviderService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由ConditionProviderService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_DEVICE_ADMINMust be required by device administration receiver, to ensure that only the system can interact with it.必须由设备管理接收器（device administration receviver）来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_DREAM_SERVICEMust be required by an DreamService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由DreamService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_INCALL_SERVICEMust be required by a InCallService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由InCallService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_INPUT_METHODMust be required by an InputMethodService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由InputMethodService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_MIDI_DEVICE_SERVICEMust be required by an MidiDeviceService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由MidiDeviceService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_NFC_SERVICEMust be required by a HostApduService or OffHostApduService to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由HostApduService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICEMust be required by an NotificationListenerService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由NotificationListenerService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_PRINT_SERVICEMust be required by a PrintService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由PrintService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_QUICK_SETTINGS_TILEAllows an application to bind to third party quick settings tiles.允许应用程序绑定到第三方的快速设置（quick setting tile）。 String BIND_REMOTEVIEWSMust be required by a RemoteViewsService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由RemoteViewsService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_SCREENING_SERVICEMust be required by a CallScreeningService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由CallScreeningService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_TELECOM_CONNECTION_SERVICEMust be required by a ConnectionService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由ConnectionService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_TEXT_SERVICEMust be required by a TextService (e.g.必须由TextService发起请求。 String BIND_TV_INPUTMust be required by a TvInputService to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由TvInputService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_VISUAL_VOICEMAIL_SERVICEMust be required by a link VisualVoicemailService to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由VisualVoicemailService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_VOICE_INTERACTIONMust be required by a VoiceInteractionService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由VoiceInteractionService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_VPN_SERVICEMust be required by a VpnService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由VpnService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_VR_LISTENER_SERVICEMust be required by an VrListenerService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由VrListenerService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BIND_WALLPAPERMust be required by a WallpaperService, to ensure that only the system can bind to it.必须由WallpaperService来发起请求，确保只有系统可以对它绑定。 String BLUETOOTHAllows applications to connect to paired bluetooth devices.允许应用程序连接已配对的蓝牙设备。 String BLUETOOTH_ADMINAllows applications to discover and pair bluetooth devices.允许应用程序发现和配对蓝牙设备。 String BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGEDAllows applications to pair bluetooth devices without user interaction, and to allow or disallow phonebook access or message access.允许应用程序在没有用户交互的情况下对蓝牙设备进行配对, 并允许或禁止访问电话簿或短消息。 String BODY_SENSORSAllows an application to access data from sensors that the user uses to measure what is happening inside his/her body, such as heart rate.允许应用程序从传感器访问数据，此传感器是用户测量其身体状态的, 如心率。 String BROADCAST_PACKAGE_REMOVEDAllows an application to broadcast a notification that an application package has been removed.删除应用程序包后，允许应用程序广播一个通知。 String BROADCAST_SMSAllows an application to broadcast an SMS receipt notification.收到SMS短消息后，允许应用程序广播一个通知。 String BROADCAST_STICKYAllows an application to broadcast sticky intents.允许应用程序广播sticky intents。 String BROADCAST_WAP_PUSHAllows an application to broadcast a WAP PUSH receipt notification.收到WAP，PUSH消息后，允许应用程序广播通知。 String CALL_PHONEAllows an application to initiate a phone call without going through the Dialer user interface for the user to confirm the call.允许应用程序在不通过拨号界面的情况下启动电话呼叫, 并且能由用户确认呼叫。 String CALL_PRIVILEGEDAllows an application to call any phone number, including emergency numbers, without going through the Dialer user interface for the user to confirm the call being placed.允许应用程序呼叫任何电话号码 (包括紧急号码), 而无需通过拨号界面, 并且能由用户确认呼叫。 String CAMERARequired to be able to access the camera device.请求访问照相机设备。 String CAPTURE_AUDIO_OUTPUTAllows an application to capture audio output.允许应用程序截获音频输出。 String CAPTURE_SECURE_VIDEO_OUTPUTAllows an application to capture secure video output.允许应用程序截获安全的视频输出。 String CAPTURE_VIDEO_OUTPUTAllows an application to capture video output.允许应用程序截获视频输出。 String CHANGE_COMPONENT_ENABLED_STATEAllows an application to change whether an application component (other than its own) is enabled or not.允许应用程序改变是否使能或静止其他应用程序的组件。 String CHANGE_CONFIGURATIONAllows an application to modify the current configuration, such as locale.允许应用程序修改当前配置 (如区域设置)。 String CHANGE_NETWORK_STATEAllows applications to change network connectivity state.允许应用程序改变网络连接状态。 String CHANGE_WIFI_MULTICAST_STATEAllows applications to enter Wi-Fi Multicast mode.允许应用程序进入Wi-Fi多播模式（Wi-Fi Multicast mode）。 String CHANGE_WIFI_STATEAllows applications to change Wi-Fi connectivity state.允许应用程序改变Wi-Fi网络连接状态。 String CLEAR_APP_CACHEAllows an application to clear the caches of all installed applications on the device.允许应用程序清除设备上所有已安装的应用程序的缓存。 String CONTROL_LOCATION_UPDATESAllows enabling/disabling location update notifications from the radio.允许通过无线模块，启用/禁止位置定位更新提示。 String DELETE_CACHE_FILESAllows an application to delete cache files.允许应用程序删除缓存文件。 String DELETE_PACKAGESAllows an application to delete packages.允许应用程序删除软件包。 String DIAGNOSTICAllows applications to RW to diagnostic resources.允许程序读取或写入诊断资源。 String DISABLE_KEYGUARDAllows applications to disable the keyguard if it is not secure.允许应用程序禁止锁屏 (不安全)。 String DUMPAllows an application to retrieve state dump information from system services.允许应用程序从系统服务接收状态，抓取信息。 String EXPAND_STATUS_BARAllows an application to expand or collapse the status bar.允许应用程序展开或折叠状态栏。 String FACTORY_TESTRun as a manufacturer test application, running as the root user.以root用户的权限执行制造商测试应用程序。 String GET_ACCOUNTSAllows access to the list of accounts in the Accounts Service.允许访问Accounts Service中的帐户列表。 String GET_ACCOUNTS_PRIVILEGEDAllows access to the list of accounts in the Accounts Service.允许访问Accounts Service中的帐户列表。 String GET_PACKAGE_SIZEAllows an application to find out the space used by any package.允许应用程序获取任何应用程序包所占用的空间。 String GET_TASKSThis constant was deprecated in API level 21. No longer enforced.此常量在API level 21版本中被取消。不再支持。 String GLOBAL_SEARCHThis permission can be used on content providers to allow the global search system to access their data.此权限可用于content provider, 以允许全局搜索系统访问其数据。 String INSTALL_LOCATION_PROVIDERAllows an application to install a location provider into the Location Manager.允许应用程序在Location Manager中安装一个LocationProvider。 String INSTALL_PACKAGESAllows an application to install packages.允许应用程序安装应用程序包。 String INSTALL_SHORTCUTAllows an application to install a shortcut in Launcher.允许应用程序在Launher中安装一个快捷方式。 String INSTANT_APP_FOREGROUND_SERVICEAllows an instant app to create foreground services.允许应用程序实例创建前台服务。 String INTERNETAllows applications to open network sockets.允许应用程序打开网络套接字（socket）。 String KILL_BACKGROUND_PROCESSESAllows an application to call killBackgroundProcesses(String).允许应用程序调用killBackgroundProcesses(String)。 String LOCATION_HARDWAREAllows an application to use location features in hardware, such as the geofencing api.允许应用程序使用硬件位置定位功能, 如geofencing api。 String MANAGE_DOCUMENTSAllows an application to manage access to documents, usually as part of a document picker.允许应用程序管理访问文档, 通常作为文件浏览器的一部分。 String MANAGE_OWN_CALLSAllows an application to manage its own calls, but rely on the system to route focus to the currently active call.允许应用程序管理自己的调用, 但依赖于系统将焦点设置到当前activity上。 String MASTER_CLEARNot for use by third-party applications.不可用与第三方应用程序。 String MEDIA_CONTENT_CONTROLAllows an application to know what content is playing and control its playback.允许应用程序知道正在播放的内容并控制其回放。 String MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGSAllows an application to modify global audio settings.允许应用程序修改全局的音频设置。 String MODIFY_PHONE_STATEAllows modification of the telephony state - power on, mmi, etc.允许修改手机状态：电源，MMI码，等。 String MOUNT_FORMAT_FILESYSTEMSAllows formatting file systems for removable storage.允许格式化可移动存储的文件系统。 String MOUNT_UNMOUNT_FILESYSTEMSAllows mounting and unmounting file systems for removable storage.允许挂载和卸载可移动存储的文件系统。 String NFCAllows applications to perform I/O operations over NFC.允许应用程序通过NFC执行输入输出操作。 String PACKAGE_USAGE_STATSAllows an application to collect component usage statistics允许应用程序收集软件包组件的使用统计数据。 Declaring the permission implies intention to use the API and the user of the device can grant permission through the Settings application.声明此授权，意味着使用API和设备的用户可以通过“Setting”应用程序授予权限。 String PERSISTENT_ACTIVITYThis constant was deprecated in API level 9. This functionality will be removed in the future; please do not use. Allow an application to make its activities persistent.此常量在API level 9版本中被取消。这个功能将在未来的版本中被删除，请不要再使用。允许应用程序设置它的activities持久运行（从系统启动到系统关闭，整个系统运行周期）。 String PROCESS_OUTGOING_CALLSAllows an application to see the number being dialed during an outgoing call with the option to redirect the call to a different number or abort the call altogether.允许应用程序查看正在拨出通话的电话号码, 该选项可将呼叫重定向到其他号码或中止呼叫。 String READ_CALENDARAllows an application to read the user’s calendar data.允许应用程序读取用户的日历数据。 String READ_CALL_LOGAllows an application to read the user’s call log.允许应用程序读取用户的电话呼叫记录。 String READ_CONTACTSAllows an application to read the user’s contacts data.允许应用程序读取用户的联系人数据。 String READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGEAllows an application to read from external storage.允许应用程序读取外部存储设备。 String READ_FRAME_BUFFERAllows an application to take screen shots and more generally get access to the frame buffer data.允许应用程序获取屏幕快照（截屏），通常得以访问帧缓冲区数据。 String READ_INPUT_STATEThis constant was deprecated in API level 16. The API that used this permission has been removed.此常量在API level 16版本中被取消。此权限的API已删除。 String READ_LOGSAllows an application to read the low-level system log files.允许应用程序读取底层系统记录文件。 String READ_PHONE_NUMBERAllows read access to the device’s phone number.允许读取设备的电话号码。 String READ_PHONE_STATEAllows read only access to phone state, including the phone number of the device, current cellular network information, the status of any ongoing calls, and a list of any PhoneAccounts registered on the device.允许只读访问电话状态, 包括设备的电话号码、当前的蜂窝网络信息、任何正在进行的呼叫的状态以及在设备上注册的任何PhoneAccount的列表。 String READ_SMSAllows an application to read SMS messages.允许应用程序读取SMS短消息。 String READ_SYNC_SETTINGSAllows applications to read the sync settings.允许应用程序读取同步设置。 String READ_SYNC_STATSAllows applications to read the sync stats.允许应用程序读取同步状态。 String READ_VOICEMAILAllows an application to read voicemails in the system.允许应用程序读取在系统中的语音信箱。 String REBOOTRequired to be able to reboot the device.请求能够重启设备。 String RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETEDAllows an application to receive the ACTION_BOOT_COMPLETED that is broadcast after the system finishes booting.允许应用程序接受，系统启动完成后，广播的ACTION_BOOT_COMPLETED的消息。 String RECEIVE_MMSAllows an application to monitor incoming MMS messages.允许应用程序监视收到的彩信(MMS)。 String RECEIVE_SMSAllows an application to receive SMS messages.允许应用程序接受SMS短消息。 String RECEIVE_WAP_PUSHAllows an application to receive WAP push messages.允许应用程序接受WAP，推送（PUSH)消息。 String RECORD_AUDIOAllows an application to record audio.允许应用程序录音。 String REORDER_TASKSAllows an application to change the Z-order of tasks.允许程序改变任务的Z轴排列。 String REQUEST_DELETE_PACKAGESAllows an application to request deleting packages.允许应用程序请求删除应用程序包。 String REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONSPermission an application must hold in order to use ACTION_REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS.使用ACTION_REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS，应用程序必须拥有此权限。 String REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGESAllows an application to request installing packages.允许应用程序请求安装应用程序包。 String RESTART_PACKAGESThis constant was deprecated in API level 8. The restartPackage(String) API is no longer supported.此常量在API level 8版本中被取消。restartPackage(String)不再支持。 String RESTRICTED_VR_ACCESSMust be required by system apps when accessing restricted VR APIs.访问受限制的VR API, 必须是系统应用程序。 String RUN_IN_BACKGROUNDAllows an app to run in the background.允许应用程序运行在后台。 String SEND_RESPOND_VIA_MESSAGEAllows an application (Phone) to send a request to other applications to handle the respond-via-message action during incoming calls.允许应用程序 (电话) 向其他应用程序发送请求, 以在来电期间处理消息的响应。 String SEND_SMSAllows an application to send SMS messages.允许应用程序发送SMS短消息。 String SET_ALARMAllows an application to broadcast an Intent to set an alarm for the user.允许应用程序广播一个Intent，为用户设置警告。 String SET_ALWAYS_FINISHAllows an application to control whether activities are immediately finished when put in the background.允许当应用程序被放置到后台时，控制是否立即完成activity。 String SET_ANIMATION_SCALEModify the global animation scaling factor.修改全局动画缩放比例。 String SET_DEBUG_APPConfigure an application for debugging.配置应用程序可以调试。 String SET_PREFERRED_APPLICATIONSThis constant was deprecated in API level 7. No longer useful, see addPackageToPreferred(String) for details.此常量在API level 7版本中被取消。不再可用, 查看 addPackageToPreferred(String)获取详细说明。 String SET_PROCESS_LIMITAllows an application to set the maximum number of (not needed) application processes that can be running.允许应用程序设置可以运行的最多(不再需要)的进程数。 String SET_TIMEAllows applications to set the system time.允许应用程序设置系统时间。 String SET_TIME_ZONEAllows applications to set the system time zone.允许应用程序设置系统时区。 String SET_WALLPAPERAllows applications to set the wallpaper.允许应用程序设置壁纸。 String SET_WALLPAPER_HINTSAllows applications to set the wallpaper hints.允许应用程序设置壁纸提示。 String SIGNAL_PERSISTENT_PROCESSESAllow an application to request that a signal be sent to all persistent processes.允许应用程序请求将信号发送到所有永久运行的进程。 String STATUS_BARAllows an application to open, close, or disable the status bar and its icons.允许应用程序打开，关闭，或禁止状态栏和状态栏图标。 String SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOWAllows an app to create windows using the type TYPE_APPLICATION_OVERLAY, shown on top of all other apps.允许应用程序使用TYPE_APPLICATION_OVERLAY类型创建窗口，可以将窗口显示在所有其他应用程序的顶层。 String TRANSMIT_IRAllows using the device’s IR transmitter, if available.允许使用设备的红外传输模块，如果有的话。 String UNINSTALL_SHORTCUTThis permission is no longer supported.此权限已经不再支持。 String UPDATE_DEVICE_STATSAllows an application to update device statistics.允许应用程序更新设备统计信息。 String USE_DATA_IN_BACKGROUNDAllows an app to use data in the background.允许应用程序在后台使用数据。 String USE_FINGERPRINTAllows an app to use fingerprint hardware.允许应用程序使用指纹硬件模块。 String USE_SIPAllows an application to use SIP service.允许应用程序使用SIP service。 String VIBRATEAllows access to the vibrator.允许应用程序使用振动硬件模块。 String WAKE_LOCKAllows using PowerManager WakeLocks to keep processor from sleeping or screen from dimming.允许使用PowerManager WakeLocks防止处理器休眠或屏幕变暗。 String WRITE_APN_SETTINGSAllows applications to write the apn settings.允许应用程序写入APN接入点设置。 String WRITE_CALENDARAllows an application to write the user’s calendar data.允许应用程序写入用户的日历数据。 String WRITE_CALL_LOGAllows an application to write (but not read) the user’s call log data.允许应用程序写入（但不可读取）的电话呼叫记录数据。 String WRITE_CONTACTSAllows an application to write the user’s contacts data.允许应用程序写入用户的日历数据。 String WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGEAllows an application to write to external storage.允许应用程序写入外部存储设备。 String WRITE_GSERVICESAllows an application to modify the Google service map.允许应用程序修改Google Service地图。 String WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGSAllows an application to read or write the secure system settings.允许应用程序读写系统安全设置。 String WRITE_SETTINGSAllows an application to read or write the system settings.允许应用程序读写系统设置。 String WRITE_SYNC_SETTINGSAllows applications to write the sync settings.允许应用程序写入同步设置。 String WRITE_VOICEMAILAllows an application to modify and remove existing voicemails in the system.允许应用程序修改或删除系统中的语音信箱。

entry.title: React Nativa 源码解析
entry.content: 在 React Native 的开发中，对源码的熟悉有利于我们快速的理解 React Native 构建原理，有助于我们快速的定位 Bug 和完成开发需求。在此，对于 React Native 的 Android 部分源码进行阅读。 ReactInstanceManager 初始化根据 React Native 官网 新建的工程。我们可以看到在 MainApplication.class 中继承接口 ReactApplication.class 实现了 getReactNativeHost 方法。从而获取了 ReactNativeHost.class 实例化对象。 ReactApplication.class接口定义 getReactNativeHost 方法，返回 ReactNativeHost。源码如下12345678public interface ReactApplication { /** * Get the default {@link ReactNativeHost} for this app. * 为当前 APP 获取默认的 ReactNativeHost 对象 */ ReactNativeHost getReactNativeHost();} MainApplication.class继承 ReactApplication.class 接口，实现 getReactNativeHost() 方法。并且定义了ReactNativeHost 为私有的成员对象。MainApplication.class 实现源码如下：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536public class MainApplication extends Application implements ReactApplication { private final ReactNativeHost mReactNativeHost = new ReactNativeHost(this) { // true 为开启调试模式 @Override public boolean getUseDeveloperSupport() { return BuildConfig.DEBUG; } // 获取 ReactPackage 集合 @Override protected List<ReactPackage> getPackages() { return Arrays.<ReactPackage>asList( new MainReactPackage() ); } //获取 JSMainModule 的名称 @Override protected String getJSMainModuleName() { return "index"; } }; //获取 mReactNativeHost @Override public ReactNativeHost getReactNativeHost() { return mReactNativeHost; } @Override public void onCreate() { super.onCreate(); //SoLoader：加载C++底层库，准备解析JS。 SoLoader.init(this, /* native exopackage */ false); }} ReactNativeHost.class由此我们继续看 ReactNativeHost.class 源码：** * ReactNativeHost 为 ReactInstanceManager 的单例模式 */public abstract class ReactNativeHost { private final Application mApplication; private @Nullable ReactInstanceManager mReactInstanceManager; protected ReactNativeHost(Application application) { mApplication = application; } /** * 获取 ReactInstanceManager 实例化对象 */ public ReactInstanceManager getReactInstanceManager() { if (mReactInstanceManager == null) { ReactMarker.logMarker(ReactMarkerConstants.GET_REACT_INSTANCE_MANAGER_START); mReactInstanceManager = createReactInstanceManager(); ReactMarker.logMarker(ReactMarkerConstants.GET_REACT_INSTANCE_MANAGER_END); } return mReactInstanceManager; } /** * 返回当前 mReactInstanceManager 是否已实例化.如果 * {@link #getReactInstanceManager()} 被调用的化，此处返回为 true, * or {@link #clear()} 被调用的化，此处返回为 false */ public boolean hasInstance() { return mReactInstanceManager != null; } /** * 销毁当前 mReactInstanceManager ，释放关联资源； */ public void clear() { if (mReactInstanceManager != null) { mReactInstanceManager.destroy(); mReactInstanceManager = null; } } /** * 实例化 ReactInstanceManager 设置相关参数； */ protected ReactInstanceManager createReactInstanceManager() { ReactMarker.logMarker(ReactMarkerConstants.BUILD_REACT_INSTANCE_MANAGER_START); ReactInstanceManagerBuilder builder = ReactInstanceManager.builder() .setApplication(mApplication) .setJSMainModulePath(getJSMainModuleName()) .setUseDeveloperSupport(getUseDeveloperSupport()) .setRedBoxHandler(getRedBoxHandler()) .setJavaScriptExecutorFactory(getJavaScriptExecutorFactory()) .setUIImplementationProvider(getUIImplementationProvider()) .setJSIModulesProvider(getJSIModulesProvider()) .setInitialLifecycleState(LifecycleState.BEFORE_CREATE); for (ReactPackage reactPackage : getPackages()) { builder.addPackage(reactPackage); } String jsBundleFile = getJSBundleFile(); if (jsBundleFile != null) { builder.setJSBundleFile(jsBundleFile); } else { builder.setBundleAssetName(Assertions.assertNotNull(getBundleAssetName())); } ReactInstanceManager reactInstanceManager = builder.build(); ReactMarker.logMarker(ReactMarkerConstants.BUILD_REACT_INSTANCE_MANAGER_END); return reactInstanceManager; } /** * 获取 RedBoxHandler 去发送 RedBox-related callbacks */ protected @Nullable RedBoxHandler getRedBoxHandler() { return null; } /** * 重写该方法使用 custom 执行； */ protected @Nullable JavaScriptExecutorFactory getJavaScriptExecutorFactory() { return null; } protected final Application getApplication() { return mApplication; } /** * Get the {@link UIImplementationProvider} to use. Override this method if you want to use a * custom UI implementation. * 获取 UIImplementationProvider，重写此方法，使用客户 UI 接口； * Note: this is very advanced functionality, in 99% of cases you don't need to override this. * 此处为比较先进的方法，很多情况下是不需要被重写的； */ protected UIImplementationProvider getUIImplementationProvider() { return new UIImplementationProvider(); } protected @Nullable JSIModulesProvider getJSIModulesProvider() { return null; } /** * 返回 the main module 的文件名。dev 模式开启条件下，从 the packager server 获取 Js bundle 资源， * ReactInstanceManager 一旦被创建，这个文件最先执行； * e.g. "index.android" */ protected String getJSMainModuleName() { return "index.android"; } /** * 返回用户自定义的 bundle file文件路径如下，默认是加载Android 工程目录 assets 下的 bundle file文件。 * e.g. "file://sdcard/myapp_cache/index.android.bundle" */ protected @Nullable String getJSBundleFile() { return null; } /** * e.g. "index.android.bundle" * 默认是返回 Android 工程目录 assets 下的 文件名为 index.android.bundle 的 Jsbundle 文件，如果其为空，并且 * 设置的 Jsbundle 的文件路径不存在，那么当前应用只在 {@code getUseDeveloperSupport} 为true， the packager * server 开启的情况下运行 */ protected @Nullable String getBundleAssetName() { return "index.android.bundle"; } /** *是否开启 dev 模式，ture 为 dev 模式 */ public abstract boolean getUseDeveloperSupport(); /** * 返回 ReactPackage 的集合，常返回的集合中至少包括有 MainReactPackage * 你也可以参考官网添加需要的 ReactPackage。 */ protected abstract List<ReactPackage> getPackages();} ReactInstanceManager.class12345678910111213141516171819/** * ReactInstanceManager 管理 CatalystInstance 实例，提供方法配置 catalyst 实例通过使用 ReactPackage，跟踪其生命周期。建立 instance 和 developers 的链接，支持 framework 的功能。 * 实例管理通过 ReactRootView 启动 JS application； * ReactInstanceManager 的生命周期应该和 ReactRootView 所属的 activity 一致。通过当前实例的 (see {@link * #onHostPause},{@link onHostDestroy} and {@link #onHostResume})和 activity 的 lifecycle events 对应一致； */@ThreadSafepublic class ReactInstanceManager { ... /** * 通过 builder 创建一个可设置的 ReactInstanceManager 实例 */ public static ReactInstanceManagerBuilder builder() { return new ReactInstanceManagerBuilder(); } ...} ReactActivity 的实现MainActivity.classMainActivity 继承 ReactActivity 实现 getMainComponentName() 方法，获取 MainComponent 的组件名。1234567891011public class MainActivity extends ReactActivity { /** * 返回 JavaScript 注册的 Main component 的yin * 这用于调度组件的呈现。 */ @Override protected String getMainComponentName() { return "rndemo"; }} ReactActivity.classReactActivityDelegate 代理实现 Activity 对应的功能。ReactActivity 设置相关的什么周期配置，物理返回处理，权限处理回调等逻辑处理。123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118/** * React Native 应用的基类 Activity */public abstract class ReactActivity extends Activity implements DefaultHardwareBackBtnHandler, PermissionAwareActivity { private final ReactActivityDelegate mDelegate; protected ReactActivity() { mDelegate = createReactActivityDelegate(); } /** * 返回 JavaScript 注册的 Main component 的yin * 这用于调度组件的呈现。 */ protected @Nullable String getMainComponentName() { return null; } /** * 构建时候调用, 重写的化可自定义 custom delegate implementation. */ protected ReactActivityDelegate createReactActivityDelegate() { return new ReactActivityDelegate(this, getMainComponentName()); } @Override protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) { super.onCreate(savedInstanceState); mDelegate.onCreate(savedInstanceState); } @Override protected void onPause() { super.onPause(); mDelegate.onPause(); } @Override protected void onResume() { super.onResume(); mDelegate.onResume(); } @Override protected void onDestroy() { super.onDestroy(); mDelegate.onDestroy(); } @Override public void onActivityResult(int requestCode, int resultCode, Intent data) { mDelegate.onActivityResult(requestCode, resultCode, data); } @Override public boolean onKeyDown(int keyCode, KeyEvent event) { return mDelegate.onKeyDown(keyCode, event) || super.onKeyDown(keyCode, event); } @Override public boolean onKeyUp(int keyCode, KeyEvent event) { return mDelegate.onKeyUp(keyCode, event) || super.onKeyUp(keyCode, event); } @Override public boolean onKeyLongPress(int keyCode, KeyEvent event) { return mDelegate.onKeyLongPress(keyCode, event) || super.onKeyLongPress(keyCode, event); } @Override public void onBackPressed() { if (!mDelegate.onBackPressed()) { super.onBackPressed(); } } @Override public void invokeDefaultOnBackPressed() { super.onBackPressed(); } @Override public void onNewIntent(Intent intent) { if (!mDelegate.onNewIntent(intent)) { super.onNewIntent(intent); } } @Override public void requestPermissions( String[] permissions, int requestCode, PermissionListener listener) { mDelegate.requestPermissions(permissions, requestCode, listener); } @Override public void onRequestPermissionsResult( int requestCode, String[] permissions, int[] grantResults) { mDelegate.onRequestPermissionsResult(requestCode, permissions, grantResults); } protected final ReactNativeHost getReactNativeHost() { return mDelegate.getReactNativeHost(); } protected final ReactInstanceManager getReactInstanceManager() { return mDelegate.getReactInstanceManager(); } protected final void loadApp(String appKey) { mDelegate.loadApp(appKey); }} ReactActivityDelegate.class 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859/** * 为 ReactActivity 和 ReactFragmentActivity 的代理类。如果 Application 没有实现接口 ReactApplication 的话，子类需要提供接口 ReactApplication 实现 getReactNativeHost()方法。 */public class ReactActivityDelegate { private final @Nullable Activity mActivity; private final @Nullable FragmentActivity mFragmentActivity; private final @Nullable String mMainComponentName; private @Nullable ReactRootView mReactRootView; private @Nullable DoubleTapReloadRecognizer mDoubleTapReloadRecognizer; private @Nullable PermissionListener mPermissionListener; private @Nullable Callback mPermissionsCallback; ... protected @Nullable Bundle getLaunchOptions() { return null; } protected ReactRootView createRootView() { return new ReactRootView(getContext()); } /** * 获取默认的 ReactNativeHost 实例, 通过 MainApplication 中实现的 getReactNativeHost 的方法； */ protected ReactNativeHost getReactNativeHost() { return ((ReactApplication) getPlainActivity().getApplication()).getReactNativeHost(); } public ReactInstanceManager getReactInstanceManager() { return getReactNativeHost().getReactInstanceManager(); } //入口 protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) { if (mMainComponentName != null) { loadApp(mMainComponentName); } mDoubleTapReloadRecognizer = new DoubleTapReloadRecognizer(); } //启动 js application protected void loadApp(String appKey) { if (mReactRootView != null) { throw new IllegalStateException("Cannot loadApp while app is already running."); } mReactRootView = createRootView(); mReactRootView.startReactApplication( getReactNativeHost().getReactInstanceManager(), appKey, getLaunchOptions()); getPlainActivity().setContentView(mReactRootView); } ...} ReactRootView.class 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051/** * ReactRootView 是 catalyst apps 默认的根视图。提供 UI 视图尺寸变化的监听，手势处理，输入键盘处理，启动 Js Applicationd 的方法等。 */public class ReactRootView extends SizeMonitoringFrameLayout implements RootView, MeasureSpecProvider { ... /** * {@see #startReactApplication(ReactInstanceManager, String, android.os.Bundle)} */ public void startReactApplication(ReactInstanceManager reactInstanceManager, String moduleName) { startReactApplication(reactInstanceManager, moduleName, null); } /** * Schedule rendering of the react component rendered by the JS application from the given JS * module (@{param moduleName}) using provided {@param reactInstanceManager} to attach to the * JS context of that manager. Extra parameter {@param launchOptions} can be used to pass initial * properties for the react component. */ public void startReactApplication( ReactInstanceManager reactInstanceManager, String moduleName, @Nullable Bundle initialProperties) { Systrace.beginSection(TRACE_TAG_REACT_JAVA_BRIDGE, "startReactApplication"); try { UiThreadUtil.assertOnUiThread(); // TODO(6788889): Use POJO instead of bundle here, apparently we can't just use WritableMap // here as it may be deallocated in native after passing via JNI bridge, but we want to reuse // it in the case of re-creating the catalyst instance Assertions.assertCondition( mReactInstanceManager == null, "This root view has already been attached to a catalyst instance manager"); mReactInstanceManager = reactInstanceManager; mJSModuleName = moduleName; mAppProperties = initialProperties; if (!mReactInstanceManager.hasStartedCreatingInitialContext()) { mReactInstanceManager.createReactContextInBackground(); } attachToReactInstanceManager(); } finally { Systrace.endSection(TRACE_TAG_REACT_JAVA_BRIDGE); } } ...} 总结Android 部分实现 React Native 的接入，我们的落脚点在 ReactRootView 的123public void startReactApplication(ReactInstanceManager reactInstanceManager, String moduleName) { startReactApplication(reactInstanceManager, moduleName, null);} 或者1234public void startReactApplication(ReactInstanceManager reactInstanceManager,String moduleName, @Nullable Bundle initialProperties) { ...} 方法。在此需要实现 ReactRootView，ReactInstanceManager。然后通过 setContentView(ReactRootView) 渲染出来。如需传参数可加 initialProperties，具体可参考上篇文章。

entry.title: React Native 常用的通信方式
entry.content: 混合 native 和 React Native js 与 js 之间，js 与 native 之间的通信是我们在 App 开发中常用到的。故此，本文总结常用的几种通信方式。本文以Android为例。 Native 向 RN 传值通过 Props 向 RN 传值方式一：通过 ReactActivityDelegate 的 getLaunchOptions() 传递 PropsJava 代码1234567891011121314151617public class MainActivity extends ReactActivity { @Override protected ReactActivityDelegate createReactActivityDelegate() { return new ReactActivityDelegate(this, getMainComponentName()) { @Override protected Bundle getLaunchOptions() { Bundle initialProperties = new Bundle(); ArrayList<String> imageList = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList( "http://foo.com/bar1.png", "http://foo.com/bar2.png" )); initialProperties.putStringArrayList("images", imageList); return initialProperties; } }; }} JavaScript 代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425'use strict';import React from 'react';import { AppRegistry, View, Image} from 'react-native';class ImageBrowserApp extends React.Component { renderImage(imgURI) { return ( <Image source={{uri: imgURI}} /> ); } render() { return ( <View> {this.props.images.map(this.renderImage)} </View> ); }}AppRegistry.registerComponent('App', () => ImageBrowserApp); 方式二：通过 ReactRootView 的 setAppProperties 方法传递 Props12345678Bundle updatedProps = mReactRootView.getAppProperties(); ArrayList<String> imageList = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList( "http://foo.com/bar1.png", "http://foo.com/bar2.png"));updatedProps.putStringArrayList("images", imageList);mReactRootView.setAppProperties(updatedProps); 方式三：通过 ReactRootView 的 startReactApplication 方法传递 Props1234567Bundle updatedProps = mReactRootView.getAppProperties(); ArrayList<String> imageList = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList( "http://foo.com/bar1.png", "http://foo.com/bar2.png"));updatedProps.putStringArrayList("images", imageList);mReactRootView.startReactApplication(mReactInstanceManager,"App",updatedProps); 通过 DeviceEventEmitter 向 RN 传值JavaScript 代码1234567891011121314151617//第一步：引入NativeModulesimport {DeviceEventEmitter} from 'react-native';var subscription ;//第二步：添加监听事件componentDidMount(){ this.subscription =DeviceEventEmitter.addListener(eventName,（params)={ if (!params) { return; } this.setState({msg: params.msg});; });;};//第三步：移除监听事件componentWillUnmount(){ this.subscription.remove();}; Java 代码：1234WritableMap params = Arguments.createMap(); params.putString("msg","hehe"); reactContext.getJSModule(DeviceEventManagerModule.RCTDeviceEventEmitter.class) .emit(eventName, params); 通过 bridge 回调向 RN 传值利用 bridge 回调向 RN 传值，我们需要知道参数类型在@ReactMethod注明的方法中，会被直接映射到它们对应的JavaScript类型。具体如下：12345678Boolean -> BoolInteger -> NumberDouble -> NumberFloat -> NumberString -> StringCallback -> functionReadableMap -> ObjectReadableArray -> Array Java 代码：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435import com.facebook.react.bridge.Promise;public class DataModule extends ReactContextBaseJavaModule {... @Override public String getName() { return "YDData"; } //方式一： promise 处理 @ReactMethod public void getData( int tag, Promise promise) { try { WritableMap map = Arguments.createMap(); map.putString("msg", "hehe"); promise.resolve(map);//成功的回调 } catch (IllegalViewOperationException e) { promise.reject(e.getMessage());//失败的回调 } } //方式二： Callback 处理 @ReactMethod public void getData( int tag, Callback errorCallback, Callback successCallback) { try { errorCallback.invoke("haha"); } catch (IllegalViewOperationException e) { successCallback.invoke(e.getMessage()); } }... JavaScript 代码：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526//引入NativeModulesimport { NativeModules } from 'react-native';var YDData = NativeModules.YDData;...//方式一： promise 处理,日志输出为： heheasync function measureLayout() { try { var { msg } = await YDData.getData(1); console.log(msg); } catch (e) { console.error(e); }}measureLayout();//方式二： Callback 处理，日志输出为： hahaYDData.getData(1, (msg) => { console.log(msg); }, (e) => { console.log(e); })； RN 向 Native 传值通过 bridge 向原生传值Java 代码：1234567891011121314import com.facebook.react.bridge.Promise;public class DataModule extends ReactContextBaseJavaModule {... @Override public String getName() { return "YDData"; } @ReactMethod public void sendData(int tag) { //todo your work }... JavaScript 代码：1234567//引入NativeModulesimport { NativeModules } from 'react-native';var YDData = NativeModules.YDData;...//rn 向原生传值YDData.sendData(1); 通过 Prop 的 setter方法进行注释@ReactProp，向 Native 传值;具体可参考 原生组件 RN 组件之间的传数值通过 DeviceEventEmitter 实现 RN 组件间传值A 组件代码–JavaScript 代码1234567891011121314151617//第一步：引入NativeModulesimport {DeviceEventEmitter} from 'react-native';var subscription ;//第二步：添加监听事件componentDidMount(){ this.subscription =DeviceEventEmitter.addListener(eventName,（params)={ if (!params) { return; } this.setState({msg: params.msg});; });};//第三步：移除监听事件componentWillUnmount(){ this.subscription.remove();}; B 组件代码–JavaScript 代码123456//第一步：引入NativeModulesimport {DeviceEventEmitter} from 'react-native';var subscription ;//第二步：DeviceEventEmitter.emit(eventName,{msg:"haha"}); 通过 Props 实现 RN 组件间传值123456789101112131415161718192021import React, { Component } from 'react';import { AppRegistry, Text, View } from 'react-native';//子组件class ChildView extends Component { render() { return ( <Text>Hello {this.props.name}!</Text> ); }}//父组件class ParentView extends Component { render() { return ( <View style={{alignItems: 'center'}}> <ChildView name='Rexxar' /> </View> ); }} 通过 ref 实现 RN 组件间传值1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738import React, { Component } from 'react';import { AppRegistry, Text, View } from 'react-native';//子组件class ChildView extends Component { // 构造 constructor(props) { super(props); // 初始状态 this.state = { name: "haha" }; } addClick(nameVue){ this.setState({ name: nameVue }); } render() { return ( <Text>Hello {this.props.name}!</Text> ); }}//父组件class ParentView extends Component { render() { return ( <View style={{alignItems: 'center'}} onPress={() => { this.refs.son.addClick("hehe") }> <ChildView ref="son" name={this.props.name} /> </View> ); }} 通过回调实现 RN 组件之间传值12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546import React, { Component } from 'react';import { AppRegistry, Text, View } from 'react-native';//子组件class ChildView extends Component { addClick(){ this.props.receiveNumber() } render() { return ( <Text onPress={this.addClick.bind(this)}>{"+"}</Text> ); }}//父组件class ParentView extends Component { // 构造 constructor(props) { super(props); // 初始状态 this.state = { number: 1 }; } receiveNumber(){ var m = this.state.number; m += 1; this.setState({ number: m }); } render() { return ( <View style={{alignItems: 'center'}}> <ChildView receiveNumber={this.receiveNumber.bind(this)}/> <View > <Text style={{fontSize: 20}}>{this.state.number}</Text> </View> </View> ); }}

entry.title: Android webview
entry.content: 由于原生组件功能更新替换速度较慢，webview 作为 app 功能及时扩展的补充也应用到各个流行的 app 中。在此对 webview 的使用，从 webview 与 js 的交互，webview 的安全漏洞及其解决方法，WebViewClient和 WebChromClient的区别等方面做详细的总结。 数据交互Android 调 js 的方法 js 代码如下： 123456<script>function onAndroidJs(msg){ //to do your work prompt(msg);}</script> java 代码如下： 12mWebView.getSettings().setJavaScriptEnabled(true);mWebView.loadUrl("javascript:onAndroidJs('haha')"); js 调 Android 的方法采用拦截 js 弹框获取方法和参数(Android 4.2之前） js 代码如下： 12345678910<script>function onJsAndroid(msg){ //to do your work prompt(msg); //or //alert(msg); //or // comfirm(msg);}</script> java 代码如下： 123456789101112131415161718192021222324mWebView.getSettings().setJavaScriptEnabled(true);mWebView.setWebChromeClient(new WebChromeClient(){ @Override public boolean onJsAlert(WebView view, String url, String message, JsResult result) { //todo your work log.i("msg",message); return super.onJsAlert(view, url, message, result); } @Override public boolean onJsConfirm(WebView view, String url, String message, JsResult result) { //todo your work log.i("msg",message); return super.onJsConfirm(view, url, message, result); } @Override public boolean onJsPrompt(WebView view, String url, String message, String defaultValue, JsPromptResult result) { //todo your work log.i("msg",message); result.confirm(); return true; }} 备注 采用result.confirm() 和 return true 弹框不会弹起； 考虑到安全许多公司的 jsbridge 的是采用的这种方式进行数据交互，参考 safe-java-js-webview-bridge可根据需求自定义通信规则，实现数据的交互; 采用 addJavascriptInterface 的方式(Android 4.2之后） js 代码如下： 12345<script>function onAndroidJs(msg){ Native.androidNative(msg);}</script> java 代码如下： 1234567mWebView.getSettings().setJavaScriptEnabled(true);mWebView.addJavascriptInterface(new Object(){ @JavascriptInterface public void androidNative(Object object){ //todo your work } },"Native"); webview 安全漏洞及其解决方法远程代码执行漏洞fix 方法123mWebView.removeJavascriptInterface("searchBoxJavaBridge_");mWebView.removeJavascriptInterface("accessibility");mWebView.removeJavascriptInterface("accessibilityTraversal"); 域控制不严格漏洞 建议不要使用addJavascriptInterface接口，以免带来不必要的安全隐患，请参照博文《在Webview中如何让JS与Java安全地互相调用》[6]。如果一定要使用addJavascriptInterface接口:1) 如果使用HTTPS协议加载URL，应进行证书校验防止访问的页面被篡改挂马；2) 如果使用HTTP协议加载URL，应进行白名单过滤、完整性校验等防止访问的页面被篡改；3) 如果加载本地Html，应将html文件内置在APK中，以及进行对html页面完整性的校验；4) 被调用函数采用@JavascriptInterface注解，如上 js 调 Android 的第二种方法； 通过File 域下执行任意 JavaScript 代码 fix 方法:123456789101112//1.对于不需要使用 file 协议的应用，禁用 file 协议； mWebView.getSettings().setAllowFileAccess(false); //2.对于需要使用 file 协议的应用，禁止 file 协议加载 JavaScript。 mWebView.getSettings().setAllowFileAccess(true); // 禁止 file 协议加载 JavaScriptif (url.startsWith("file://") { mWebView.getSettings().setJavaScriptEnabled(false);} else { mWebView.getSettings().setJavaScriptEnabled(true);} 通过file url 加载的 Js代码读取其他的本地文件 123// 在Android 4.1前默认允许// 在Android 4.1后默认禁止mWebView.getSettings().setAllowFileAccessFromFileURLs(false); 通过 file url 加载的 Javascript 可以访问其他的源(包括http、https等源) 123// 在Android 4.1前默认允许（setAllowFileAccessFromFileURLs（）不起作用）// 在Android 4.1后默认禁止webView.getSettings().setAllowUniversalAccessFromFileURLs(false); 总结：对于需要使用 file 协议的应用，禁止 file 协议加载 JavaScript。1234567891011121314// 1.需要使用 file 协议setAllowFileAccess(true); setAllowFileAccessFromFileURLs(false);setAllowUniversalAccessFromFileURLs(false);if (url.startsWith("file://") { setJavaScriptEnabled(false);} else { setJavaScriptEnabled(true);}//2.不需要使用 file 协议setAllowFileAccess(false); setAllowFileAccessFromFileURLs(false);setAllowUniversalAccessFromFileURLs(false); Password 明文存储漏洞WebView默认开启password保存功能 ：1mWebView.getSettings().setSavePassword(true) fix 方法：1mWebView.getSettings().setSavePassword(false) WebViewClient 和 WebChromeClient 的区别区别：WebViewClient 是对 View 事件的回调处理，而WebChromeClient 是对 Chrome 事件的回调处理； WebViewClient 常用方法源码 /** Notify the host application that a page has started loading. This method * is called once for each main frame load so a page with iframes or * framesets will call onPageStarted one time for the main frame. This also * means that onPageStarted will not be called when the contents of an * embedded frame changes, i.e. clicking a link whose target is an iframe, * it will also not be called for fragment navigations (navigations to * #fragment_id). * * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param url The url to be loaded. * @param favicon The favicon for this page if it already exists in the * database. */public void onPageStarted(WebView view, String url, Bitmap favicon) {}/** * Notify the host application that a page has finished loading. This method * is called only for main frame. When onPageFinished() is called, the * rendering picture may not be updated yet. To get the notification for the * new Picture, use {@link WebView.PictureListener#onNewPicture}. * * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param url The url of the page. */public void onPageFinished(WebView view, String url) {}/** * Notify the host application that the WebView will load the resource * specified by the given url. * * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param url The url of the resource the WebView will load. */public void onLoadResource(WebView view, String url) {}/** * Notify the host application of a resource request and allow the * application to return the data. If the return value is null, the WebView * will continue to load the resource as usual. Otherwise, the return * response and data will be used. NOTE: This method is called on a thread * other than the UI thread so clients should exercise caution * when accessing private data or the view system. * * @param view The {@link android.webkit.WebView} that is requesting the * resource. * @param url The raw url of the resource. * @return A {@link android.webkit.WebResourceResponse} containing the * response information or null if the WebView should load the * resource itself. * @deprecated Use {@link #shouldInterceptRequest(WebView, WebResourceRequest) * shouldInterceptRequest(WebView, WebResourceRequest)} instead. */@Deprecatedpublic WebResourceResponse shouldInterceptRequest(WebView view, String url) { return null;}/** * Notify the host application of a resource request and allow the * application to return the data. If the return value is null, the WebView * will continue to load the resource as usual. Otherwise, the return * response and data will be used. NOTE: This method is called on a thread * other than the UI thread so clients should exercise caution * when accessing private data or the view system. * * @param view The {@link android.webkit.WebView} that is requesting the * resource. * @param request Object containing the details of the request. * @return A {@link android.webkit.WebResourceResponse} containing the * response information or null if the WebView should load the * resource itself. */public WebResourceResponse shouldInterceptRequest(WebView view, WebResourceRequest request) { return shouldInterceptRequest(view, request.getUrl().toString());}/** * Report an error to the host application. These errors are unrecoverable * (i.e. the main resource is unavailable). The errorCode parameter * corresponds to one of the ERROR_* constants. * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param errorCode The error code corresponding to an ERROR_* value. * @param description A String describing the error. * @param failingUrl The url that failed to load. * @deprecated Use {@link #onReceivedError(WebView, WebResourceRequest, WebResourceError) * onReceivedError(WebView, WebResourceRequest, WebResourceError)} instead. */@Deprecatedpublic void onReceivedError(WebView view, int errorCode, String description, String failingUrl) {}/** * Report web resource loading error to the host application. These errors usually indicate * inability to connect to the server. Note that unlike the deprecated version of the callback, * the new version will be called for any resource (iframe, image, etc), not just for the main * page. Thus, it is recommended to perform minimum required work in this callback. * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param request The originating request. * @param error Information about the error occured. */public void onReceivedError(WebView view, WebResourceRequest request, WebResourceError error) { if (request.isForMainFrame()) { onReceivedError(view, error.getErrorCode(), error.getDescription().toString(), request.getUrl().toString()); }}/** * Notify the host application that an HTTP error has been received from the server while * loading a resource. HTTP errors have status codes &gt;= 400. This callback will be called * for any resource (iframe, image, etc), not just for the main page. Thus, it is recommended to * perform minimum required work in this callback. Note that the content of the server * response may not be provided within the <b>errorResponse</b> parameter. * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param request The originating request. * @param errorResponse Information about the error occured. */public void onReceivedHttpError( WebView view, WebResourceRequest request, WebResourceResponse errorResponse) {}/** * Notify the host application to update its visited links database. * * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param url The url being visited. * @param isReload True if this url is being reloaded. */public void doUpdateVisitedHistory(WebView view, String url, boolean isReload) {}/** * Notify the host application that an SSL error occurred while loading a * resource. The host application must call either handler.cancel() or * handler.proceed(). Note that the decision may be retained for use in * response to future SSL errors. The default behavior is to cancel the * load. * * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback. * @param handler An SslErrorHandler object that will handle the user's * response. * @param error The SSL error object. */public void onReceivedSslError(WebView view, SslErrorHandler handler, SslError error) { handler.cancel();}/** * Notify the host application to handle a SSL client certificate * request. The host application is responsible for showing the UI * if desired and providing the keys. There are three ways to * respond: proceed(), cancel() or ignore(). Webview stores the response * in memory (for the life of the application) if proceed() or cancel() is * called and does not call onReceivedClientCertRequest() again for the * same host and port pair. Webview does not store the response if ignore() * is called. * * This method is called on the UI thread. During the callback, the * connection is suspended. * * For most use cases, the application program should implement the * {@link android.security.KeyChainAliasCallback} interface and pass it to * {@link android.security.KeyChain#choosePrivateKeyAlias} to start an * activity for the user to choose the proper alias. The keychain activity will * provide the alias through the callback method in the implemented interface. Next * the application should create an async task to call * {@link android.security.KeyChain#getPrivateKey} to receive the key. * * An example implementation of client certificates can be seen at * <A href="https://android.googlesource.com/platform/packages/apps/Browser/+/android-5.1.1_r1/src/com/android/browser/Tab.java"> * AOSP Browser</a> * * The default behavior is to cancel, returning no client certificate. * * @param view The WebView that is initiating the callback * @param request An instance of a {@link ClientCertRequest} * */public void onReceivedClientCertRequest(WebView view, ClientCertRequest request) { request.cancel();}/** * Notifies the host application that the WebView received an HTTP * authentication request. The host application can use the supplied * {@link HttpAuthHandler} to set the WebView's response to the request. * The default behavior is to cancel the request. * * @param view the WebView that is initiating the callback * @param handler the HttpAuthHandler used to set the WebView's response * @param host the host requiring authentication * @param realm the realm for which authentication is required * @see WebView#getHttpAuthUsernamePassword */public void onReceivedHttpAuthRequest(WebView view, HttpAuthHandler handler, String host, String realm) { handler.cancel();} WebChromClient 常用方法源码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051/** * Tell the client to display a javascript alert dialog. If the client * returns true, WebView will assume that the client will handle the * dialog. If the client returns false, it will continue execution. * @param view The WebView that initiated the callback. * @param url The url of the page requesting the dialog. * @param message Message to be displayed in the window. * @param result A JsResult to confirm that the user hit enter. * @return boolean Whether the client will handle the alert dialog. */public boolean onJsAlert(WebView view, String url, String message, JsResult result) { return false;}/** * Tell the client to display a confirm dialog to the user. If the client * returns true, WebView will assume that the client will handle the * confirm dialog and call the appropriate JsResult method. If the * client returns false, a default value of false will be returned to * javascript. The default behavior is to return false. * @param view The WebView that initiated the callback. * @param url The url of the page requesting the dialog. * @param message Message to be displayed in the window. * @param result A JsResult used to send the user's response to * javascript. * @return boolean Whether the client will handle the confirm dialog. */public boolean onJsConfirm(WebView view, String url, String message, JsResult result) { return false;}/** * Tell the client to display a prompt dialog to the user. If the client * returns true, WebView will assume that the client will handle the * prompt dialog and call the appropriate JsPromptResult method. If the * client returns false, a default value of false will be returned to to * javascript. The default behavior is to return false. * @param view The WebView that initiated the callback. * @param url The url of the page requesting the dialog. * @param message Message to be displayed in the window. * @param defaultValue The default value displayed in the prompt dialog. * @param result A JsPromptResult used to send the user's reponse to * javascript. * @return boolean Whether the client will handle the prompt dialog. */public boolean onJsPrompt(WebView view, String url, String message, String defaultValue, JsPromptResult result) { return false;} WebView 常见问题的处理方法当前Webview实现h5页面间跳转1234567891011webview.setWebViewClient(new WebViewClient(){ @Override public boolean shouldOverrideUrlLoading(WebView view, String url) { if(url!=""){ //在当前的webview中跳转到新的url view.loadUrl(url); } // 是否使用第三方浏览器 返回true不调用 返回false调用 return true; } }); 点击返回键，返回上一个页面，而不是退出程序12345678public boolean onKeyDown(int keyCode, KeyEvent event) { if (keyCode == KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BACK && webView.canGoBack()) { // 返回前一个页面 webView.goBack(); return true; } return super.onKeyDown(keyCode, event);} H5中视频播放加载失败的问题12345678910//1、AndroidManifest.xml中 在webview所在的activity配置文件加入下面属性<uses-feature android:hardwareAccelerated="true" />//2、添加如下代码,没加的话，视频会加载失败 webSettings.setPluginState(WebSettings.PluginState.ON)//3、5.0 以上的手机要加这个判断if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP) { webSettings.setMixedContentMode(WebSettings.MIXED_CONTENT_ALWAYS_ALLOW);} 清除webview缓存123456@Overrideprotected void onDestroy() { super.onDestroy(); //清除webview缓存 webView.clearCache(true);} webView拦截url12345// 此回调是拦截点击要跳转的url链接，并对请求的url链接做修改（添加删除字段）public WebResourceResponse shouldInterceptRequest(WebView view, String url) // 在点击请求的是链接是才会调用，重写此方法控制url是否打开，是否到系统默认浏览器打开public boolean shouldOverrideUrlLoading(WebView view, String url) 支持https的问题1234567891011121314//方法一：//1.设置setMixedContentModeif (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP) webSettings.setMixedContentMode(WebSettings.MIXED_CONTENT_ALWAYS_ALLOW); //2.WebViewClient 添加ssl error 错误处理@Override public void onReceivedSslError(WebView view, SslErrorHandler handler, SslError error) { //handler.cancel(); 默认的处理方式，WebView变成空白页 handler.proceed();接受证书 //handleMessage(Message msg); 其他处理} //3.混淆文件添加-keep public class android.net.http.SslError 常用方法说明12345678910111213setJavaScriptEnabled(true); //支持jssetPluginsEnabled(true); //支持插件 setUseWideViewPort(false); //将图片调整到适合webview的大小 setSupportZoom(true); //支持缩放 setLayoutAlgorithm(LayoutAlgorithm.SINGLE_COLUMN); //支持内容重新布局 supportMultipleWindows(); //多窗口 setCacheMode(WebSettings.LOAD_CACHE_ELSE_NETWORK); //关闭webview中缓存 setAllowFileAccess(true); //设置可以访问文件 setNeedInitialFocus(true); //当webview调用requestFocus时为webview设置节点webview webSettings.setBuiltInZoomControls(true); //设置支持缩放 setJavaScriptCanOpenWindowsAutomatically(true); //支持通过JS打开新窗口 setLoadWithOverviewMode(true); // 缩放至屏幕的大小setLoadsImagesAutomatically(true); //支持自动加载图片

entry.title: shell-实战-1
entry.content: 项目需要将 code-push-server 部署到私有服务器，服务路由都是由 nginx 配置的。手动替换对应的资源路由在上线部署时，耗时量大，还易错。故此，想偷懒是否可以用一条命令来完成对应的路由修改。 参考了许多文档，特别感谢阮一峰老师,Node.js 命令行程序开发教程这篇文章给我的启示让我实现了我想要的功能。具体实现如下： replace 脚本实现添加依赖包12$ npm install --save shelljs$ npm install --save yargs 新建文件 replace 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980 #!/usr/bin/env nodevar fs = require('fs');var argv = require('yargs') .option('f', { alias : 'name', demand: false, default: './views', describe: '需要替换字符串的文件目录', type: 'string' }) .option('d', { alias : 'old', demand: false, default: "router/code-push-server", describe: '被替换的字符串', type: 'string' }) .option('p', { alias : 'pre', demand: true, describe: '新的字符串', type: 'string' }) .usage('Usage:node replace [options]') .example('node replace -f ./views -d router/code-push-server -p router/code-push-server-new') .help('h') .alias('h', 'help') .epilog('copyright 2018,by CodeTu') .argv;var shell = require("shelljs");/** * 替换目录下所有文件内容中含有oldStr的字符串为newStr * @param path 目录文件 * @param oldStr * @param newStr */function replace(path,oldStr,newStr){ fs.readdir(path, function(err, files){ if(err){ console.log('error:\n' + err); return; } files.forEach(function(file){ fs.stat(path + '/' + file, function(err, stat){ if(err){console.log(err); return;} if(stat.isDirectory()){ // 如果是文件夹遍历 replace(path + '/' + file,oldStr,newStr); }else{ // 读出所有的文件 var filePath = path + '/' + file; console.log('文件名:' +filePath); fs.readFile(filePath,"utf8",function (err,data) { if (err){ return console.log(err); } var data = data.toString().replace(new RegExp(oldStr,'g'),newStr); fs.writeFile(filePath, data, function(err) { if (err) { return console.error(err); } console.log(filePath+"替换成功！"); }); }) } }); }); });}if (argv.f !=null && argv.d !=null && argv.p!=null) { replace(argv.f,argv.d,argv.p);}else { shell.exec("node replace -h");} 执行命令1$ node replace -f 文件目录 -d 被替换的字符串 -p 新字符串 命令帮助1$ node replace -h 详情如下：123456789101112Usage:node replace [options]Options: -f, --name 需要替换字符串的文件目录 [string] [default: "./views"] -d, --old 被替换的字符串 [string] [default: "router/code-push-server"] -p, --pre 新的字符串 [string] [required] -h, --help Show help [boolean]Examples: node replace -f ./views -d router/code-push-server -p router/code-push-server-newcopyright 2018,by CodeTu

entry.title: Code Push
entry.content: 因公司项目需要，React Native 热更新采用的是微软的 Code Push。本文记录需要掌握的 Code Push 常用命令以及私有服务部署的易错点。 code-push 常用命令code-push install1sudo npm install -g code-push-cli account manager1234567891011code-push logout后再code-push login 也会跳转到网页获得一个key,复制后到终端即可登录成功。code-push registercode-push login link 登陆code-push logout 注销code-push access-key ls 列出登陆的tokencode-push access-key rm <accessKye> 删除某个 access-key app manager12345678910code-push app add 在账号里面添加一个新的appcode-push app remove 或者 rm 在账号里移除一个appcode-push app rename 重命名一个存在appcode-push app list 或则 ls 列出账号下面的所有appcode-push app transfer 把app的所有权转移到另外一个账号 deployment manager123456789101112code-push deployment ls appNamecode-push deployment rename appName 重命名code-push deployment rm appName 删除部署code-push deployment ls appName 列出应用的部署情况code-push deployment ls appName -k 查看部署的keycode-push deployment history appName deploymentNmae app push123456789101112131415161718第一种：code-push release-react appname platfrom第二种：1. 新建bundles文件，生产资源文件： "node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/react-native/local-cli/cli.js bundle --entry-file index.js --platform android --dev false --bundle-output bundles/index.android.bundle --assets-dest bundles --sourcemap-output /tmp/sourcemap.txt"2. 发布更新code-push release <应用名称> <Bundles所在目录> <对应的应用版本> --deploymentName： 更新环境--description： 更新描述 --mandatory： 是否强制更新 eg:code-push release appName-android ./bundles 3.1.2 --deploymentName Staging -m true all command1234567891011121314151617181920Usage: code-push <command>命令： access-key View and manage the access keys associated with your account app View and manage your CodePush apps collaborator View and manage app collaborators debug View the CodePush debug logs for a running app deployment View and manage your app deployments link Link an additional authentication provider (e.g. GitHub) to an existing Mobile Center account login Authenticate in order to begin managing your apps logout Log out of the current session patch Update the metadata for an existing release promote Promote the latest release from one app deployment to another register Register a new Mobile Center account release Release an update to an app deployment release-cordova Release a Cordova update to an app deployment release-react Release a React Native update to an app deployment rollback Rollback the latest release for an app deployment whoami Display the account info for the current login session 部署私有服务器部署 code-push-server 参考如下https://github.com/lisong/code-push-server 部署 code-push-web 参考如下https://github.com/lisong/code-push-web 易错点 code-push 和 react native 版本需对应。可参考Supported React Native platforms ； 服务端有 nginx 路由配置时，以上两个服务的对应资源和接口路由需要作出相应的改变。 扩展下载地址 react_native and react-native-code-push

entry.title: Hello Hexo
entry.content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start1$ hexo new "My New Post" Create a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment Deploy to GitHub 修改工程目录下的配置文件： 1234deploy: type: git repository: git@github.com:name/name.github.io.git bransh: master 在终端下执行： 1$ hexo d -g 中文链接：Hexo and NexT
